title: Users
description: Operate on user accounts — lock/unlock, reset passwords, force logout, and inspect session activity.

table.emptyDescription: Try adjusting the search or clearing the filter.
table.error: Could not load users. Please try again.

resetDialog.title: Reset password for {name}?
resetDialog.description: A password reset email will be sent to {email}. The user will be required to set a new password on next sign-in.

lockDialog.lockDescription: The user will be unable to sign in until an admin unlocks the account. Existing sessions will remain active until they expire — use Force logout to end them immediately.
lockDialog.unlockDescription: The user will regain the ability to sign in. Their previous password remains valid.

forceLogoutDialog.title: Force logout {name}?
forceLogoutDialog.description: All active sessions and refresh tokens for this user will be revoked. The user will need to sign in again. This action cannot be undone.

toast.forceLogoutSuccess: User logged out from all sessions.
toast.error: Something went wrong. Please try again.

announce.error: Could not load users. Please try again.
